description: In this image, we see actor Jason Bateman in a scene from the movie "Zootopia". He is seated at a desk, engrossed in his work on a laptop that's open in front of him. His attire consists of a yellow shirt and blue jeans, adding a pop of color to the otherwise monochrome room. The room itself is dimly lit, with the exception of a window adorned with orange curtains that let in some light. Bateman's focused expression suggests he is deeply immersed in whatever he's viewing on his laptop screen.
